---
title: "TV Show Analysis"
author: "Dilara"
format: html
---

# Overview

*Suits* is a legal drama TV series that premiered in 2011.

# Image

![Suits Logo](https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/7/79/Suits_USA_Network_series_logo.png)

# Data

```{r}
viewership <- c(4.6, 4.2, 3.5, 3.0, 2.5)
season <- 1:5

plot(season, viewership, type="b",
     main="Viewership over Seasons",
     xlab="Season", ylab="Millions")


change <- diff(viewership)
plot(change, type="b",
     main="Change in Viewership",
     ylab="Difference")
